name: Masked HERO Fountain
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｍ・ＨＥＲＯ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>マスクドヒーロー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ファウンティン
desc: You can reveal this card in your hand; Special Summon 1 "HERO" monster from your hand in Defense Position. If this card is sent to the GY by card effect, or to activate a card effect: You can Set 1 "Mask Change" from your Deck or GY. You can only use each effect of "Masked HERO Fountain" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can reveal this card in your hand; Special Summon 1 "HERO" monster from your hand in Defense Position. If this card is sent to the GY by card effect, or to activate a card effect: You can Set 1 "Mask Change" from your Deck or GY. You can only use each effect of "Masked HERO Fountain" once per turn.
eff: You can reveal this card in your hand; Special Summon 1 "HERO" monster from your hand in Defense Position. If this card is sent to the GY by card effect, or to activate a card effect: You can Set 1 "Mask Change" from your Deck or GY. You can only use each effect of "Masked HERO Fountain" once per turn.

action: Reveals itself in the hand for cost
Activates if sent to the Graveyard
